---
title: "My wish list"
author: "Clay Ford"
date: "2026-03-28"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


## Books
- [Project Hail Mary](https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/project-hail-mary-andy-weir/1137456421?ean=9780593135228)
- [Lonesome Dove](https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/lonesome-dove-larry-mcmurtry/1001920809?ean=9781439195260)
- [The Count of Monte Cristo](https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/the-count-of-monte-cristo-alexandre-dumas/1100068698?ean=9780140449266)

## Electronics
- [Casio AE1000W-8AV](https://www.casio.com/us/watches/casio/product.AE-1000W-8AV/)
- [Masterforce® 1,200-Amp Lithium-Ion Jump Starter](https://www.menards.com/main/tools/automotive/chargers-jumper-cables/masterforce-reg-1-200-amp-lithium-ion-jump-starter/clj1200mf/p-1642874292192761-c-9100.htm)
- [Green Mattell Football 2 Game](https://ebay.us/m/ZamnAH) (doesn't have to be this listing)

## Food and Personal Care
- [Kylito's 4 pack](https://kylitos.com/shop/ols/products/4-pack-price-includes-shipping) (original and hot, two of each)
- [2.25 oz. Orange Blossom Honey Hand & Body Lotion](https://nakedbee.com/collections/orange-blossom-honey-hand-body-lotion/products/orange-blossom-honey-lotion-2-25-oz)
- [Hi-Pitch Mosaic IPA](https://hiwirebrewing.com/beer/) (Hi-Wire Brewing)
- [Duke Cannon Illegally Cut Pine Soap](https://dukecannon.com/collections/holiday-soap/products/illegally-cut-pine)
